title: ThomsonLint Findings
description: Schema for ThomsonLint design review findings JSON files. A complete review writes three peer arrays: issues (problems requiring triage), verified_checks (analyses the agent performed where the result was OK), and cross_checks (design-wide analyses that span multiple ontology rules — e.g., an SMPS layout check that touches PWR_BUCK_001/002/003/004 plus a thermal calc).

project_name.description: Name of the project being reviewed.

source_documents.description: Every input the reviewer consumed: PDFs, schematic/board/stackup JSON exports, and per-layer / silkscreen / schematic-sheet image PNGs. Each entry must be cited in at least one finding's evidence[].source so coverage can be verified mechanically.

path.description: Path relative to repo root, e.g., exports/Boost - MT3608 - SOT23-6 - C84817.pdf

label.description: Short label for citation, e.g., 'MT3608 datasheet'.

verified_checks.description: Analyses the agent performed where the result was OK. These are first-class deliverables — every datasheet read or calculation that produced no problem still belongs here so the designer can see what was checked.

cross_checks.description: Design-wide analyses spanning multiple ontology rules — e.g., layout-vs-datasheet recommendations for an IC, thermal accounting for a converter.

oneOf.description: Single ontology rule ID this finding cites.
Multiple ontology rule IDs (used by cross_checks that span rules).

rule_id.description: Ontology rule(s) this entry cites. Optional for verified_checks and cross_checks where the analysis does not map to a single rule (e.g., a thermal calculation).

severity.description: Required for issues. For verified_checks and cross_checks, omit or set to 'Informational'.

domain.description: Design domain (Power, HighSpeed, Analog, EMC, Thermal, DFM, etc.).

description.description: Detailed prose. Do NOT embed parameter tables here — use evidence[] so renderers can format them as real tables.

evidence.description: Typed evidence rows. Each row is either a parameter comparison (datasheet vs. design with margin/verdict) or a free-form note. Every row must cite a source.

recommended_actions.description: Corrective actions. Required for issues; omit for verified_checks.

label.description: What is being measured/compared (e.g., 'VDS abs max', 'Pin 4 function', 'Thermal ΔT'). Set for parameter rows; may be omitted for free-form note rows.

datasheet.description: Datasheet/spec value. Set for parameter rows.

design.description: Observed/computed value in this design. Set for parameter rows.

note.description: Free-form qualifier or fact (e.g., 'Clamped by D2 freewheel'). Use this for non-tabular evidence.

source.description: Where this came from. Must match a source_documents[].path or otherwise identify the origin (e.g., 'AON7544 ds p.2 Fig.1', 'comet_sch-thomson-export-sch.json'). For image evidence, give the PNG filename optionally followed by a free-form locator (e.g., 'comet_brd-img-cu-L2-GND.png — pour gap visible near C12') — the renderer auto-detects the image extension and embeds a thumbnail. Required so coverage can be verified.
